home.title: Configuration
home.subtitle: Set up the Telegram notification and CRM parameters, then proceed to the body assessment form.
home.form_desc: Configure Telegram bots, CRM IDs, and language before starting.
home.chat_ids_help: Enter one or more Telegram chat IDs separated by commas.
home.bot_index_help: Which Telegram bot to use (from the bots table).

footer.disclaimer: Formula-based health assessment — not medical advice. Consult a healthcare professional for diagnosis.

landing.hero_subtitle: A five-minute questionnaire that calculates BMI, body fat percentage, waist-to-hip ratio, caloric needs, and macros — then turns them into a nutrition plan tailored to your goal.
landing.stats_1_label: Key health metrics calculated from your measurements and lifestyle data.
landing.stats_2_label: Average time to complete the assessment — results are instant.
landing.stats_3_label: Languages supported — full localisation for a global audience.
landing.stats_4_label: Formula-based — every number is traceable to a published method.
landing.metrics_subtitle: From five body measurements and a lifestyle questionnaire, we calculate everything a nutritionist needs to build your plan — using WHO-endorsed and peer-reviewed formulas.
landing.metric_1_body: Body Mass Index — weight relative to height squared. Categorised from underweight through obesity III using WHO thresholds.
landing.metric_2_body: Estimated body fat percentage using the Deurenberg formula, adjusted for age and sex. Categorised into low fat, healthy, overweight, and obesity.
landing.metric_3_body: A key indicator of visceral fat distribution and cardiovascular risk. Gender-specific thresholds for low, moderate, and high risk.
landing.metric_4_body: Your total daily energy expenditure, calculated from basal metabolic rate, activity level, and adjusted for your goal — lose, maintain, or gain.
landing.metric_5_body: Personalised protein, carbohydrate, and fat ratios based on your goal. Includes daily protein target in grams based on body weight.
landing.metric_6_body: The percentage of your body that isn't fat — bones, organs, muscles, water. Higher lean mass means a faster metabolism.
landing.metric_7_body: Estimated using the Watson formula. Proper hydration supports every function from temperature regulation to nutrient transport.
landing.metric_8_body: Your ideal weight range calculated from height and sex using the Lorentz formula. Gives you a concrete target, not just a BMI band.
landing.services_subtitle: Every assessment generates a comprehensive health report with gauges, charts, personalised recommendations, and a product stack matched to your conditions.
landing.service_1_body: Visual gauge showing where you sit on the WHO scale, your healthy weight range, and how far you are from your ideal.
landing.service_2_body: Body fat percentage, lean mass, and body type classification — with age and gender-specific healthy ranges.
landing.service_3_body: Waist-to-hip ratio with gender-specific risk levels. A reliable proxy for visceral fat and metabolic health.
landing.service_4_body: Daily calorie target adjusted for your activity and goal, plus a protein/carb/fat split with gram-level protein recommendation.
landing.service_5_body: Total body water estimate and daily hydration target. Cross-referenced with your water intake habits.
landing.service_6_body: Supplements matched to your selected health conditions — from protein and electrolytes to sleep and circulation support.
landing.service_plan_body: BMI follows WHO standards. Body fat uses the Deurenberg equation. Metabolic rate uses Mifflin-St Jeor. Water uses Watson. Every metric links back to a published, peer-reviewed method.
landing.how_step1_text: Name, email, date of birth, and location — so we can personalise your report and send it to your coach.
landing.how_step2_text: Weight, height, waist, and hip circumference. Four measurements — and from them we calculate eight key health metrics.
landing.how_step3_text: Diet type, meals, exercise level, hydration, health conditions, and your goal. This shapes everything from calories to product matches.
landing.how_step4_text: Instant results — BMI gauge, body fat category, calorie target, macro split, recommended supplements, and a full health summary.
landing.formulas_subtitle: Every metric in your report is calculated using a published, clinically validated formula. Here are the three we rely on most.
landing.formula_1_desc: The gold standard for estimating resting energy expenditure. Validated across populations since 1990. We multiply by your activity level and goal to get your daily calorie target.
landing.formula_2_desc: Estimates body fat from BMI, age, and sex. More accurate than BMI alone — catches the difference between a muscular 28 and an overfat 28.
landing.formula_2_evidence: Published in British Journal of Nutrition
landing.formula_3_desc: Predicts total body water volume from anthropometric data. Used in clinical settings to assess hydration and guide fluid intake recommendations.
landing.testimonials_subtitle: Early feedback from coaches and users testing the assessment during the beta.
landing.testimonial_1_text: I used to spend 20 minutes per client doing these calculations by hand. Now the assessment does it in seconds — and the report looks better than anything I could make.
landing.testimonial_2_text: The waist-to-hip ratio flagged a risk level I'd missed. The product recommendations were spot-on for the condition.
landing.testimonial_3_text: After a re-assessment six weeks later, the body fat and waist numbers were down — and having them side by side made the progress clear.
landing.testimonial_4_text: The hydration calculation alone changed how I advise clients. Most of them were drinking half of what they needed on training days.
landing.testimonial_5_text: The supplement recommendations are evidence-based and tied to actual conditions. No generic multivitamin suggestions — every pick has a reason.
landing.cta_body: Four short steps, four body measurements, and you'll have your BMI, body fat, calorie target, macro split, and a supplement stack — calculated, not guessed.
landing.footer_tagline: Building healthier bodies through science, formulas, and care.
landing.testimonials_beta: Feedback from our early beta coaches and users.

scan.rail_sub: Seven short steps. Takes about five minutes — your health assessment is built from this.
scan.access_message: To use the body assessment, you need a personalised access link from your coach. Please contact your coach to get started.
scan.analyzing_subtitle: Calculating composition, estimating body fat, cross-checking your nutrition snapshot. Roughly 30 seconds.

step1.display_sub: Tell us about yourself — we use this to tailor your report and reach you with results.
step1.name: Name
step1.phone_placeholder: Enter your phone number with country code
step1.disclaimer: We will send your report directly to your WhatsApp. Please verify that your phone number is correct. Thank you!

step2.display_sub: Your body measurements help us calculate your health metrics accurately.
step2.measurement_intro: Do you know your waist and hip measurements? Would you like me to measure them for you? It will only take a moment. (A measuring tape is recommended.)
step2.waist_help: Used to calculate your waist-to-hip ratio.
step2.hip_help: Used to calculate your waist-to-hip ratio.

step3.display_sub: What you eat shapes everything — we start here.
step3.diet_type: What kind of diet do you follow?
step3.meals_per_day: How many meals a day do you eat?
step3.breakfast_description: What kind of breakfast do you usually have?
step3.breakfast_description_placeholder: Briefly explain the combination of foods you usually eat.

step4.display_sub: How you move and how much you drink — two big levers.
step4.exercise_level: What is your level of physical exercise?

exercise_level_options.little: Little or no exercise / Office work

step4.exercise_duration: How long have you been exercising?
step4.water_intake: How many liters of water do you drink per day?

step5.display_sub: Select anything that applies — we use this to tailor product recommendations.
step5.health_conditions: Select one or more of the following conditions:

health_conditions_options.low_energy: Feels low on energy during the day
health_conditions_options.skin_cellulite: Wants to improve the appearance of skin and/or cellulite
health_conditions_options.demanding_job: Has a very demanding and physically exhausting job

step6.display_sub: What you're aiming for, and what you're already doing.
step6.goal: What goal would you like to achieve?

goal_options.weight_control: Control my weight and reduce body fat percentage
goal_options.maintain_care: Maintain my weight, but start taking better care of myself

step6.weight_at_ideal_age: Realistically, at what weight would you feel good?
step6.has_skincare_routine: Do you follow a daily wellness or self-care routine?
step6.skincare_products: What kind of products do you use?
step6.want_facial_evaluation: Would you like a free wellness consultation?
step6.disclaimer: This self-assessment is not intended for diagnostic or therapeutic purposes. It is for informational purposes only and does not replace in any case the evaluation of a healthcare professional.

step7.display_sub: Review your information and make sure everything is correct.
step7.title: Ready to send?
step7.description: Review your information and make sure everything is correct.
step7.note: Before submitting, ensure that all the data you have provided is accurate.
step7.tip: Check your email ({{email}}) and phone number ({{phone}}) for possible errors.
step7.open_results:
Hello {{customerName}},

Thank you for completing the questionnaire and trusting us with your body assessment!

Very soon, the person who invited you to the study will contact you to share the report results.

Completing this information is the first step. We will be in touch with you soon!

Kind regards.

scan.analyze_error: Could not analyze your photo. We saved your form — your coach will follow up.
scan.photo_subtitle: Your form is saved. Add a full-body photo and we'll combine it with your numbers for a deeper read on posture, composition, and where to focus. Skip if you'd rather wait for your coach.
scan.camera_help_title: Hold steady — we auto-capture the sharpest frame.
scan.camera_help_body: Make sure your full face is visible inside the dashed oval, with even lighting on both sides.
scan.upload_help_title: Photos are processed, never permanently stored.
scan.upload_help_body: Only the JSON analysis and your email are kept. Images are auto-deleted within 24 hours.
scan.analyzing_subtitle_simple: Hang tight — this takes about 30 seconds.

personal.birth_date_required: The date of birth is required.
personal.phone_invalid: The phone number must be valid.

habits.meals_per_day_required: Please select the number of meals.
habits.has_breakfast_required: Please indicate if you usually have breakfast.
habits.exercise_duration_required: Please select how long you have been exercising.
habits.water_intake_required: Please select your daily water intake.
habits.has_skincare_routine_required: Please indicate if you have a care routine.
habits.want_facial_evaluation_required: Please indicate if you would like a wellness consultation.
habits.privacy_policy_required: You must accept the privacy policy to continue.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains what personal data we collect, how we process it, who we share it with, and what rights you have under applicable data protection laws including the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
privacy.data_collected: We collect the following personal data when you use our body assessment service: your name, email address, phone number, date of birth, country, city, and questionnaire responses about your body, lifestyle and health habits.
privacy.how_we_process: Your questionnaire responses are stored securely in our database. Health metrics (BMI, body fat %, waist-to-hip ratio, caloric needs, etc.) are calculated from your measurements. All data is stored to provide your report and allow your coach to review results with you.
privacy.lawful_basis: We process your personal data based on your explicit consent, which you provide by accepting the privacy policy before submitting the body assessment form. You may withdraw your consent at any time by contacting us.
privacy.third_parties: We use the following third-party services to process your data: Vercel (application hosting) and Neon (database hosting). Each provider processes data in accordance with their own privacy policies and applicable data protection standards.
privacy.data_retention: Your personal data and analysis results are retained for as long as necessary to provide our services. You may request deletion of your data at any time. Upon receiving a valid deletion request, we will erase your data within 30 days.
privacy.your_rights: Under the GDPR and applicable data protection laws, you have the right to: access your personal data, rectify inaccurate data, erase your data (right to be forgotten), restrict processing, data portability, object to processing, and withdraw consent at any time. Exercising these rights will not affect the lawfulness of processing carried out before withdrawal.
privacy.how_to_contact: To exercise any of your rights, or if you have questions about this policy, please contact us at: privacy@nutritional.app. We will respond to your request within 30 days.
privacy.cookies: This application uses only essential cookies required for the service to function (e.g., language preference). We do not use tracking cookies, advertising cookies, or analytics cookies.
privacy.changes: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. When we make changes, we will update the 'Last updated' date at the top of this page.

common.timeout: Analysis took too long. Please try again.

results.metrics_lede: Each metric is scored 0–100 against healthy bands for your age and sex. Tap a card for the full description.
results.insights_lede: Four lenses on the same data — what's working, what's stressed, what your habits are doing to it, and where to aim next.
results.tips_lede: Small adjustments, sequenced. The routine is built around your concerns — order, frequency, and timing all included.
results.products_lede: Personalised for your body assessment — picks ranked by how directly they support your lowest-scoring metrics and goal.
results.form_data_desc: All the information you provided during your body assessment.

body_camera.error_invalid: Use a JPEG or PNG photo.
body_camera.error_read: Could not read the file. Try another.
body_camera.camera_tip_body: Wear fitted clothing, keep arms slightly away from your body, and frame from head to ankles inside the dotted outline.
body_camera.upload_tip_body: We never store the raw image after analysis — only the secure URL of an anonymized copy you can delete any time.

metrics_desc.bmi: Weight relative to height squared. Classified using WHO bands from underweight through obesity III.
metrics_desc.body_fat: Estimated using the Deurenberg formula, adjusted for your age and sex.
metrics_desc.lean_mass: The non-fat share of your body — bones, organs, muscle, water. Higher lean mass means faster metabolism.
metrics_desc.waist_hip_ratio: Cardiometabolic risk proxy with gender-specific bands for low / moderate / high.
metrics_desc.healthy_weight: Lorentz-formula healthy target adjusted for height and sex.
metrics_desc.total_body_water: Watson equation estimate of total body water in liters.
metrics_desc.bmr: Mifflin-St Jeor BMR — kilocalories you burn at rest each day.
metrics_desc.calorie_target: BMR scaled by your activity level and your weight goal.
metrics_desc.protein_target: Protein grams per day calibrated to support your goal.
metrics_desc.carbs_target: Carbohydrate grams per day from the goal-specific macro split.
metrics_desc.fat_target: Fat grams per day from the goal-specific macro split.
metrics_desc.hydration_target: Liters per day based on body weight (0.033 L per kg).

rd.prod1_why: Post-workout recovery formula with BCAAs. Matched to your exercise frequency of 4–5 days/week.
rd.prod2_why: Plant-based meal replacement designed to support weight management and reduce abdominal fat.
rd.prod3_why: Omega-3 EPA+DHA supplement supporting cardiovascular health and healthy cholesterol levels.
rd.risk_strength_note: Lean mass up 0.8 kg. Deficit is sparing muscle.
rd.risk_action_note: WHR at upper edge. Anterior fat pattern.
rd.hero_subtitle: Your body assessment — a snapshot of where you stand today. Read it once, then let the plan do the work.
rd.bmi_range_caption: Sits 0.9 above the healthy ceiling. Lean mass explains most of that — composition reads cleaner than BMI alone.
rd.bmi_spectrum_caption: BMI maps weight to height only — it can't see muscle. The silhouettes show the broad external shape each band tends to produce.
rd.bf_range_caption: Estimated from BMI, age and sex (Deurenberg).
rd.bf_spectrum_caption: You read in the Fitness band — visible tone without extremes. The figures show the typical external look across the male body-fat range.
rd.whr_range_caption: Waist relative to hip — a proxy for where fat sits.
rd.whr_spectrum_caption: Waist-to-hip ratio reflects where fat sits. Lower ratios carry less cardiometabolic risk; the shapes show low, moderate and high distribution.
rd.comp_water_note: of which body water {{pct}}% · part of lean mass
rd.comp_caption: Lean mass is a key marker of metabolic health and helps protect muscle during a calorie deficit.
rd.tbw_caption: Below the 60% reference. Daily intake target raised to 2.5 L.
rd.ch_energy_title: What your body needs from here.
rd.macro_desc: Set by your goal — protein, carbs and fat as a share of your daily calories.
rd.rec_lede: Each item is tied to a specific signal in your assessment. If the signal isn't yours, the item isn't either.
rd.ch_health_title: The full picture, at a glance.
rd.summary_working: Your strongest metrics are holding inside their healthy bands.
rd.summary_drifting: Keep an eye on the lowest-scoring metric in your report.
rd.summary_week: Pick one habit from your plan and hold it all week.
rd.cta_body: Four weeks gives the plan time to bend the trend lines. We'll compare side-by-side and rebuild the next phase from actual results.
rd.disclaimer_body: Body composition and metrics are estimates based on published formulas. Consult a healthcare professional for diagnosis.
rd.risk_strength_fallback: Your strongest metric is performing well.
rd.risk_watch_fallback: This area could use some attention.
rd.cta_body_v2: Give the plan time to move the numbers. Your coach will reach out when it's time for your next assessment and adjust from there.
rd.scan_caption: Your uploaded photo, used for the AI body-composition read.
rd.ins_bf: Estimated body fat {{value}}% — {{category}} for your age band.
rd.ins_lean: Lean mass at {{value}}% of body weight.
rd.ins_cal: Daily calorie target {{kcal}} kcal based on your activity and goal.
rd.ins_goal_above: You're {{delta}} kg above the Lorentz healthy-weight target.
rd.ins_goal_below: You're {{delta}} kg below the Lorentz target — focus on lean mass.
rd.ins_goal_at: You're already at your Lorentz target weight.
rd.ins_goal_default: Maintain current habits and re-assess in 4 weeks.
rd.ins_concern_default: No critical concerns flagged by the formulas.
rd.tip_water: Match daily water intake to your hydration target.
rd.tip_protein: Hit your protein target — split evenly across meals.
rd.tip_sleep: Aim for 7-9 hours of sleep — recovery shapes composition more than training volume.
rd.bmi_cap_under: Sits {{delta}} below the healthy floor of 18.5. The plan focuses on building, not cutting.
rd.bmi_cap_in: Inside the healthy band (18.5–25). The goal is holding it there.
rd.bmi_cap_over: Sits {{delta}} above the healthy ceiling of 25. Composition (lean vs fat) tells the fuller story below.
rd.bf_cap_low: Below the healthy floor for your age and sex — fueling and lean mass come first.
rd.bf_cap_healthy: Inside the healthy band for your age and sex.
rd.bf_cap_overweight: Above the healthy band — the plan targets gradual fat loss while protecting muscle.
rd.bf_cap_obesity: Well above the healthy band — steady, coached fat loss is the priority.
rd.whr_cap_moderate: Moderate risk band — worth watching as the plan progresses.
rd.whr_cap_high: High risk band — central fat carries cardiometabolic risk; the plan prioritises it.
rd.tbw_cap_ok: {{pct}}% body water — within the healthy reference range.
rd.tbw_cap_below: {{pct}}% body water — below the 60% reference; your daily hydration target closes the gap.
rd.scan_no_read: The AI couldn't extract detailed notes from this photo. Your metrics below are calculated from your measurements and are not affected.

atlas.title: See it, understand it.
atlas.subtitle: A visual library for walking through results — switch the lens and tap any figure to enlarge it.
atlas.empty: No visuals for this combination yet.
atlas.cap_bodyfat: How the same body reads across the body-fat range — same height and weight, different composition.
atlas.cap_bmi: The broad external shape each BMI band tends to produce — BMI can't see muscle.
atlas.cap_whr: Where fat sits. Lower waist-to-hip ratios carry less cardiometabolic risk.
atlas.cap_visceral: A see-through view of the midsection: golden visceral fat builds around the organs as the stage worsens — the fat that matters most for health.
atlas.cap_layers: A cutaway through the abdominal wall — skin, subcutaneous fat, muscle, then visceral fat — thickening from lean to high.
atlas.cap_facial: Visible signs of wellness in the face — hydration, skin radiance, under-eye freshness — from vibrant to depleted.
atlas.cap_facialfat: How the face reshapes across the body-fat range — fuller cheeks and a softer jaw at higher fat, sharper cheekbones and a defined jawline as it drops.
atlas.cap_posture: Alignment patterns from the side — neutral stack vs. rounded shoulders vs. anterior pelvic tilt.

measure.title: How to take your measurements
measure.waist_desc: Measure around the narrowest part of your abdomen, without pulling the tape tight.
measure.hip_desc: Measure around the widest part of your hips and glutes.
measure.tip: Keep the tape level and parallel to the floor.
